items.name: Dark Emo Jester Mask - Grungy Alt Clown
items.description:
Add a touch of mystery to your avatar with this Dark Emo Jester Mask. Featuring a striking monochrome design with deep, hollowed eyes and a weathered, grungy texture, this mask is the ultimate accessory for alt, horror, and gothic styles. Perfect for those looking for a haunting harlequin or a dark circus aesthetic. Whether you're haunting a royal court or rocking a streetwear look, this mask makes a bold statement.

Tags: Jester, Mask, Emo, Grunge, Dark, Gothic, Aesthetic, Horror, Monochrome, Clown, Harlequin, Alt, Pierrot, Spooky, Shadow.
